_doc: Champion/challenger fleet registry, schema fleet-v2 (2026-06-25 grid rebuild). AN ACCOUNT IS NOT A STRATEGY. Every account is a (gate-strictness x contract-sizing) profile; EVERY validated strategy in automation/state/fleet/strategies.py runs on EVERY account via fleet_executor.plan_all. The account only decides how SELECTIVE the entry gate is (gate_override) and how BIG the position is (sizing = strike depth + qty + risk cap). NO direction locks, NO per-account strategy silos (the old PUT_ONLY / loose-aggressive-as-a-strategy framing was the bug J flagged). NEVER store secrets here -- key_ref points to the GITIGNORED secrets.json. Account#/equity broker-verified 2026-06-20.
update_note: GRID REBUILD 2026-06-25: 6 SPY arms recast as a clean 2x3 matrix -- SIZING {safe, risky} x GATE {tight, base, loose}. safe-2 + bold-2 stay the mcp_heartbeat CONTROLS (production params, base gate). The 4 fleet_rest arms are the gate variants. Stripped risky-1's PUT_ONLY and all per-account 'hypothesis' strategy framing. Strategies now live in strategies.py and run on all arms. WATCH-SAFE preserved: every fleet_rest arm INERT until build_shared_signal emits passed=true (the separate SCORING_PEAK_LIVE producer flip). Pre-grid config saved at accounts.json.bak-2026-06-25-pre-grid.

sizing_profiles.safe: SAFE risk cap (30%), qty 5/8 at $2K, OTM strikes (params_patch strike_tier_table='bold' to fit the $600 notional cap at $2K -- ATM doesn't place this small).
sizing_profiles.risky: BOLD risk cap (50%), qty 8/12 at $2K, OTM strikes (bold table default).

strategy_set: automation/state/fleet/strategies.py (ribbon_ride, vwap_continuation) -- run on ALL arms via plan_all

arms.note: SAFE sizing, TIGHT gate. Most selective safe arm: only multi-trigger confluence/sequence setups, smallest qty. Trades the full strategy set.
CONTROL -- production v15 Safe, traded by the live heartbeat (mcp_heartbeat, NOT fleet_rest). The untouched safe baseline the grid is measured against.
SAFE sizing, LOOSE gate. Broadest safe participation (any single fired trigger), smallest qty. Trades the full strategy set.
RISKY sizing, TIGHT gate. PUT_ONLY REMOVED -- trades BOTH directions on the full strategy set; the account only adds selectivity + bold sizing.
CONTROL -- production v15 Bold, traded by the live aggressive heartbeat (mcp_heartbeat). The untouched risky baseline.

RISKY sizing, LOOSE gate. Highest-frequency arm (any single trigger, bold qty). Trades the full strategy set, both directions. Every hard floor still binds (one-position, -50% kill-switch, EOD flatten). NOTE: the earlier replay_fleet_arms entry-fidelity miss (single-trendline_rejection bears dropped because trendline_rejection was absent from build_shared_signal.ENTRY_TRIGGERS) is a PRODUCER perception gap, not an arm defect -- under the grid model every arm runs every strategy, so it is fixed in the producer (FIX2 / ENTRY_TRIGGERS), never by benching the required risky x loose cell.
THE OPTION TAX IS THE KILLER, NOT THE READ -- same strategy set on a linear instrument; if MES captures the move the edge is real and the fix is the instrument.

EDGE #3 -- MES leads -> trade MNQ laggard on a >=2-bar divergence. VALIDATED OOS +$71.46/tr, 8/8 gates. DORMANT (enabled=false); no live order path until a human flips enabled. A distinct futures-pair strategy, kept as its own arm because the instrument differs.

promotion_gate.beat_baseline_margin_note: a strategy or gate/sizing cell must beat the frozen control by a margin surviving multiple-comparison correction across the active arms

next_steps: ENGINE: build_shared_signal must emit the strategies[] set (each validated edge evaluated independently) so plan_all sees all strategies -- the grid is wired but currently fed only the production-mirror bull/bear blocks.
DEPLOY (after-close, flagged): flip build_shared_signal SCORING_PEAK_LIVE on so the fleet_rest arms place; gate on tests green + a fleet_live --quiet WATCH eyeball.
WIRE: mes-linear-sim to the TT futures sandbox harness (docs/futures/).
